title: 🚀 v2.0.0: Ascii Art Creator — Generate banners, boxes, cowsay-style art, tables, and image...
content:
Generate banners, boxes, cowsay-style art, tables, and image-to-ASCII with multiple fonts

🆕 v2.0.0 features:
• Advanced CLI with 8+ subcommands
• JSON output for automation
• Built-in self-tests (CI-ready)
• Zero dependencies (Python stdlib)
• Cross-platform (Windows/macOS/Linux)

Free + MIT. Live on ClawHub: https://clawhub.ai/skills/skills/ascii-art-creator
GitHub: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/ascii-art-creator

#ClawHub #OpenClaw #AIAgent #Python #DevTools
